general_ui_ux_design_guidelines: Embrace negative space. Use Generous Spacing Philosophy with padding values 2-3x larger than typical.
Never use purely centered, symmetrical layouts for marketing elements; use asymmetry to create visual tension.
Focus on optical alignment rather than strict geometrical alignment.
Ensure WCAG AA compliance or APCA standards for contrast; heavily tinted overlays on images must preserve text legibility.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all interactive and key informational elements.

headings.usage_rules: Use for all H1-H4. Must use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter. H1 maximum text-6xl. Do not use generic fonts like Inter.

body.usage_rules: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and small text. leading-relaxed for body.

visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use subtle drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,75,0,0.3)] for primary active states.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid full-screen gradients. Use localized soft radial gradients (e.g., bg-gradient-radial from-primary/10 to-transparent) behind hero text or key components.
visual_enhancers.noise: Apply a very subtle SVG noise or grain texture overlay fixed to the background to remove digital flatness.

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped (rounded-full), bg-primary text-white, hover:bg-primary_hover, transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,75,0,0.4)] active:scale-95.
buttons.secondary: Pill-shaped, bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 active:scale-95.

cards.standard: rounded-3xl bg-[#111111] border border-white/10 p-8 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-2xl hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300.
cards.glass: rounded-3xl backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10 p-8.

navigation.style: Sticky, fixed top-0, w-full, z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/70 border-b border-white/10 pt-4 pb-4. DO NOT use completely transparent header.

grids_layouts.bento_grid: Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6. Mix spans like col-span-8 row-span-2 and col-span-4 row-span-1 to create asymmetrical tension.
grids_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Sections should use py-24 or py-32. Internal padding for cards p-8 or p-10.

motion.framer_motion: Use for scroll reveals (staggered fade-up), micro-interactions on cards (scale, border-glow).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.3s ease, opacity 0.3s ease. Do not use 'all'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images has a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-b from-black/80 to-transparent for dark mode).
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.

image_urls.description: Man in black jacket riding motorcycle during daytime - Gives a premium urban mobility vibe.
Man riding on black motor scooter - Perfect for the daily commute aspect.
Campus buildings surrounded by trees at sunset - Great for 'Student-only' trusted colleges backdrop.

media.icons: lucide-react for generic icons. Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense dashboard views.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use framer-motion for 3D card tilts (e.g. react-parallax-tilt) to add a premium hardware-like feel to the modules without the overhead of full R3F.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing sections to ensure maximum layout freedom.
Use Shadcn UI primarily for the App Dashboard preview cards and complex interactive forms.
Ensure the layout relies heavily on asymmetry and negative space. Do not center everything.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use dark colors as gradients. Use solid dark colors with distinct borders.
Do not center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is banned).
Add micro-animations for hover states, transitions, parallax effects. Static is dead.
Never use generic AI emojis like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Never use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). If an image is missing, find a suitable Unsplash image.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
